subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-27 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: The affluent show no mercy unto the poor, and they themselves are tormented. Were they to show compassion, both they themselves and the poor would find repose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اغنیا رحم بر فقرا نمی کنند، خودشان هم معذب هستند.  اگر رحم می کردند، هم خود راحت بودند هم فقرا
subcodes.subjects: @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @humility; meekness; lowliness
